description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous Integration that runs on every push to master and develop branches, and on pull requests, while skipping documentation file changes. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-windows. The build-linux job should use an ubuntu-latest environment with a custom Docker container, prepare the file tree, configure CMake, build, install, run unit tests, build as a third-party, and run functional tests. The build-windows job should use a windows-latest environment, clone the vcpkg repository, set up dependencies, display installed packages, build with CMake, and run unit tests.
